member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.Configuration
member.summary: Defines MSBuild build configurations.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.Configuration.Release
member.summary: Release build configuration.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.Configuration.Debug
member.summary: Debug build configuration.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.KeysInConfiguration
member.summary: Defines property keys found within MSBuild configuration property groups.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.KeysInConfiguration.DefineConstants
member.summary: DefineConstants property for preprocessor directives.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.KeysInConfiguration.PlatformTarget
member.summary: PlatformTarget property for CPU architecture targeting.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks
member.summary: Framework versions and platform constants for MSBuild projects

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks.UapFwVersions
member.summary: List of Universal Windows Platform framework versions

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks.NetFwVersions
member.summary: List of .NET Framework versions

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks.TargetPlatformVersion
member.summary: Target platform version property name

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks.TargetPlatformMinVersion
member.summary: Target platform minimum version property name

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes
member.summary: Constants for MSBuild project item types used in csproj files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.Content
member.summary: Content item type - files included as content in the output.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.Compile
member.summary: Compile item type - source code files to compile.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.Reference
member.summary: Reference item type - assembly references.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.PackageReference
member.summary: PackageReference item type - NuGet package references.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.ProjectReference
member.summary: ProjectReference item type - project-to-project references.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.None
member.summary: None item type - files included in the project but not compiled or copied.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.OverloadResolutionPriorityAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the priority of a member in overload resolution. When unspecified, the default priority is 0.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.OverloadResolutionPriorityAttribute.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The priority of the attributed member. Higher numbers are prioritized, lower numbers are deprioritized. 0 is the default if no attribute is present.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.OverloadResolutionPriorityAttribute.Priority
member.summary: The priority of the member.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ParamCollectionAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that a method will allow a variable number of arguments in its invocation.
